sources.title: The Mummy's Curse (1944)
sources.description: An irrigation project in the rural bayous of Louisiana unearths living mummy Kharis, who was buried in quicksand twenty-five years earlier.

sources.title: MUMMY' S CURSE 1944 colorized
sources.description: An irrigation project in the rural bayous of Louisiana unearths living mummy Kharis, who was buried in quicksand twenty-five years earlier.
